name: LES Multiservices
description_short: LR Multiservices is a Bronx-based accounting and tax preparation firm offering tax filing, accounting services, real estate brokerage, money transfers, notary services, and translations.
description_long:
LR Multiservices is a small professional services firm located in the Bronx, New York, founded and operated by Lissette Ramirez (an accountant and real estate broker) and Leslie Ramirez (a tax preparer). The company has been active in the community for several years, maintaining a presence on social media and a functional website highlighting their service offerings. They serve a primarily Spanish-speaking clientele in the Bronx area, as evidenced by bilingual communications and their translation services.

The company offers a diverse range of services spanning accounting, tax preparation, real estate services, notary public functions, money transfers, and translations. Their primary focus appears to be income tax preparation and accounting support, particularly during tax season when they promote these services heavily. They also facilitate money transfers, which aligns with their original check-cashing categorization, though this is a secondary service rather than their core business. Their real estate services are provided by a licensed broker on staff.

What distinguishes LR Multiservices is their integration of multiple professional services under one roof, allowing clients to handle accounting, tax, real estate, and financial services needs at a single location. The personalized nature of the business—with named, identifiable owners and a local community focus—may appeal to clients seeking relationship-based service rather than corporate alternatives. They maintain responsive communication channels including email, phone, and social media.

A realistic assessment reveals LR Multiservices as a legitimate small professional services firm rather than a financial services lender. The original categorization as "check-cashing" appears inaccurate; while they do offer money transfers, this is clearly not their primary business. Their services lean toward business/accounting support and real estate, making them better suited to a business services or accounting category. The company maintains limited online presence beyond their basic website and Facebook page, and there is minimal third-party verification or review data available.
pros: Bilingual services (Spanish/English) serving the Bronx Latino community
Multi-disciplinary approach combining tax prep, accounting, real estate, and notary services under one roof
Licensed real estate broker on staff offering brokerage services
Local, community-based firm with identifiable ownership and personalized service
Responsive contact channels including phone, email, and social media
Established presence in the Bronx with a physical office location
cons: Very limited online presence and minimal third-party reviews or verification
No pricing transparency available on website or social media
Unclear which services are the core business versus ancillary offerings
Small firm with limited staff, potentially creating capacity constraints during tax season
No credentials or certifications displayed for tax preparers or accountants
best_for: Spanish-speaking individuals in the Bronx seeking tax preparation and accounting services
Small business owners needing integrated accounting and real estate services
Real estate buyers/sellers working with the licensed broker in the Bronx area
diagnosis: LR Multiservices is best for Spanish-speaking individuals and small business owners in the Bronx seeking bundled accounting, tax preparation, and real estate services from a local, personalized firm. The main caveat is that this is a very small operation with minimal online transparency, no published pricing, no visible credentials, and extremely limited third-party verification—making due diligence difficult for new clients.
